name: Malicious File Execution from Email Attachment Path
description: Detects execution of files from email client temporary directories
query:
// Detect file execution from email temp directories
// Trigger on processes from Outlook or Thunderbird temp paths
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)(Content\.Outlook|Thunderbird.*tmp|\\olk[A-F0-9]+\\)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
